title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud infrastructure, potentially leading to service disruptions, data loss, and financial damage. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can infiltrate development environments and propagate malicious code across cloud systems.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and multi-factor authentication (MFA) for CI/CD pipelines and cloud accounts.
Conduct a comprehensive review of CI/CD pipeline configurations to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor and block suspicious activities in cloud environments.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal direct risk, but improper use or reliance on it without validation could lead to missed vulnerabilities or false positives/negatives. Additionally, if the tool is compromised or maliciously modified, it could introduce risks to users.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment before integrating it into production workflows.
Verify the authenticity and integrity of the tool by reviewing its source code and checking for signs of tampering.
Use the tool as a supplementary measure alongside existing vulnerability management processes, not as a sole solution.

title:
Overview: 
A vulnerability has been found in FAST/TOOLS and CI Server. The web server may return...
description:
Overview: 
A vulnerability has been found in FAST/TOOLS and CI Server. The web server may return a response containing the CI Server setting information. This information could 
be exploited by an attacker for other attacks. 

The affected products and versions are as follows:

FAST/TOOLS (Packages: RVSVRN, UNSVRN, HMIWEB, FTEES, HMIMOB) R9.01 to R10.04

CI Server (All packages) R1.01 to R1.04

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-11833.

title: Nuxt versions 4.0.0 before 4.4.7 and 3.x before 3.21.7 fail to validate script-capable URLs in...
description: Nuxt versions 4.0.0 before 4.4.7 and 3.x before 3.21.7 fail to validate script-capable URLs in the navigateTo open option, allowing client-side script execution. Attackers can supply javascript: URLs through the open parameter to execute arbitrary scripts in the application's origin when user-controlled input is passed to navigateTo.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56698.

title: Nuxt versions 4.0.0 before 4.4.7 and 3.x before 3.21.7 accept protocol-relative paths such as /...
description: Nuxt versions 4.0.0 before 4.4.7 and 3.x before 3.21.7 accept protocol-relative paths such as //evil.com in the reloadNuxtApp function; these pass the script-protocol check but resolve to a cross-origin URL against the current page protocol. Attackers can inject paths like //evil.com to redirect users to attacker-controlled hosts, enabling phishing and OAuth authorization-code theft.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-56697.

title: Gogs has the ability to import local repositories via Mirror Settings
description: ### Summary The Gogs Mirror Settings functionality provide an alternative way from the well protected New Migration functionality for any authenticated users to import local repositories. This issue stems from a lack of validation of SaveAddress function. ### Details Here is the function implementation of the secure New Migration functionality. Here is the functio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Gogs' Mirror Settings functionality allows authenticated users to import local repositories without proper validation. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive repositories, potential data leakage, or injection of malicious code into trusted repositories.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of Gogs as soon as it becomes available to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the Mirror Settings functionality to trusted users only and monitor repository import activities for any suspicious behavior.
Conduct a security audit of repositories to identify any unauthorized imports or changes and remediate as necessary.

title: Gogs Vulnerable to CSRF Leading to Organization Owner Takeover
description:
## Summary

In **Gogs 0.14.1**, organization team member management can be performed via **GET requests without CSRF protection**.
If a victim who is an **organization owner** is logged in and is tricked into visiting a crafted link, an attacker-controlled user can be added to the **Owners** team. As a result, the attacker gains **organization owner–equivalent privileges**.

---

## Description

When a victim is logged in as an organization owner, **team member management endpoints are exposed v

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-52800.

title: Gogs Missing Authorization in Attachment Download
description:
## Summary

In Gogs 0.14.1, `GET /attachments/:uuid` returns the raw attachment file **without verifying whether the requester has view permission for the associated Issue/Comment/Release or the repository**.
In a test environment with `REQUIRE_SIGNIN_VIEW = false`, we confirmed that **an unauthenticated user can download attachments belonging to a private repository**.

## Description

`/attachments/:uuid` retrieves an attachment record solely by the UUID provided in the URL and returns the cor

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-52799.

title: Gogs has Stored XSS in `.ipynb` Preview
description:
# Summary

Although `.ipynb` previews are sanitized on the server side via `/-/api/sanitize_ipynb`, the inserted content is **re-rendered on the client side without sanitization** using `marked()` on elements with the `.nb-markdown-cell` class. During this process, links containing schemes such as `javascript:` can be regenerated.

As a result, when a victim views an attacker-crafted `.ipynb` file and clicks the link, **arbitrary JavaScript is executed in the Gogs origin**, leading to a click-ba

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-52798.

title: Gogs has DoS in rendering issue index pattern
description: ### Summary Special template of issue index pattern may cause panic. ### Details in internal/markup/markup.go ```go link = fmt.Sprintf(`%s`, com.Expand(metas["format"], metas), m) ``` Issue index pattern is rendered to link with `com.Expand`. However, `com.Expand` is not safe. ```go i = strings.Index(template, "}") if s, ok := match[template[:i]]; ok { ``` when `{` is found but `}` not found, i comes to 1, template[:-1] will be called, and then panicked ![image](https://

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Gogs could lead to a denial-of-service (DoS) condition when a specially crafted issue index pattern is rendered, causing the application to panic and potentially crash. This could disrupt services relying on Gogs for version control and issue tracking.
recommended_actions: Update to the latest patched version of Gogs as soon as a fix is released to address CVE-2026-52796.
Implement input validation or sanitization for issue index patterns to prevent malformed templates from causing application crashes.
Monitor application logs for unusual behavior or crashes related to issue rendering and apply temporary mitigations, such as disabling custom templates, if necessary.

title: @actual-app/web has CSV Formula Injection in Transaction Export via Imported Payee/Notes Fields
description:
## Summary

`exportToCSV` and `exportQueryToCSV` in `packages/loot-core/src/server/transactions/export/export-to-csv.ts` pass user-controlled `Payee`, `Notes`, `Account`, and `Category` strings to `csv-stringify` with no `cast` callback and no formula-prefix neutralization. Strings that begin with `=`, `+`, `-`, `@`, tab, or carriage return survive verbatim into the exported CSV. When the victim (or anyone they share the export with) opens the file in Excel, LibreOffice Calc, or Google Sheets, t

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-50179.

title: @budibase/backend-core has potential SSRF DNS rebinding bypass in outbound fetch validation
description:
Summary

Authenticated users with automation permissions can bypass Budibase's SSRF blacklist through DNS rebinding.

The outbound fetch flow validates a hostname against the blacklist before the request is sent, but the actual socket connection later performs a separate DNS lookup through node-fetch. Since the validated IPs are never pinned to the connection, an attacker-controlled hostname can return a public IP during validation and a private/internal IP during the real connection.

This resu

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated users with automation permissions to bypass SSRF protections via DNS rebinding, potentially exposing internal systems and sensitive data to unauthorized access or manipulation.
recommended_actions: Implement DNS resolution pinning to ensure that the IP address validated during hostname verification is used for the actual connection.
Update to the latest patched version of @budibase/backend-core once available and monitor for security advisories related to CVE-2026-54353.
Restrict automation permissions to trusted users and audit existing permissions to minimize the risk of exploitation.

title: Budibase has arbitrary file read by workspace-builder via PWA-zip symlink upload
description:
## Summary

`POST /api/pwa/process-zip` at `packages/server/src/api/routes/static.ts:24` accepts a builder-uploaded `.zip`, extracts it with `extract-zip@2.0.1` into a temp directory, then for each entry listed in `icons.json` validates the icon path, opens it, and streams the bytes into MinIO. The resulting object is served back via `GET /api/assets/{appId}/pwa/{uuid}.png`.

`extract-zip@2.0.1` preserves absolute symlink targets when restoring symlink entries. The icon-source validator at `pack

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-54352.

title: Budibase: Mass Assignment in Webhook Trigger Allows Cross-Workspace Automation Execution via appId Override
description:
## Summary

The webhook trigger endpoint in Budibase is publicly accessible and passes the full HTTP request body into automation execution parameters. A mass assignment vulnerability in `externalTrigger()` allows an attacker to overwrite the internal `appId` property by including it in the webhook POST body. When the automation is processed asynchronously (the default path for webhooks without a collect step), the worker executes the attacker-defined automation in the context of the victim's wo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows attackers to exploit a mass assignment flaw in the webhook trigger of Budibase, enabling unauthorized cross-workspace automation execution. This could lead to data leakage, unauthorized actions, and potential compromise of sensitive workflows across multiple workspaces.
recommended_actions: Apply the security patch or update provided by Budibase immediately to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the webhook trigger endpoint using IP whitelisting or authentication mechanisms to prevent unauthorized access.
Review and monitor automation logs for any suspicious or unauthorized activity, particularly focusing on cross-workspace automation executions.

title: @actual-app/sync-server: Disabled OpenID users keep access through existing session tokens
description:
### Summary

In OpenID multi-user mode, disabling a user only blocks future OpenID login for that identity. Existing Actual session tokens for the disabled user remain valid, so the user can continue calling authenticated server endpoints after an administrator has disabled the account.

### Details

The disabled-user check is present during OpenID login finalization. Existing users are only accepted when the matching row has `enabled = 1`, and a disabled row causes the OpenID grant to fail befo

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-49229.

title: Budibase: POST /api/attachments/:datasourceId/url is unauthenticated and lets anonymous callers mint S3 PUT pre-signed URLs using stored datasource IAM credentials
description:
## Summary

The Budibase server route `POST /api/attachments/:datasourceId/url` ([`packages/server/src/api/routes/static.ts`](https://github.com/Budibase/budibase/blob/56d2a984/packages/server/src/api/routes/static.ts)) is registered with **only** the `recaptcha` middleware. There is no `authorized(...)` middleware in the chain. The controller (`packages/server/src/api/controllers/static/index.ts::getSignedUploadURL`) looks the requested datasource up, instantiates an AWS S3 client with the data

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to generate AWS S3 pre-signed PUT URLs using stored datasource IAM credentials. This could lead to unauthorized file uploads, potential data exfiltration, or abuse of cloud resources, resulting in financial loss, data breaches, or compliance violations.
recommended_actions: Immediately patch the Budibase server to the latest version if a fix is available or implement custom middleware to enforce authentication and authorization on the affected route.
Audit AWS S3 bucket policies and IAM credentials to ensure least privilege access and monitor for any unauthorized activity.
Enable logging and monitoring for S3 bucket access and configure alerts for unexpected or suspicious activity.

title: Budibase: Unauthenticated S3 signed upload URL generation allows arbitrary writes with stored datasource credentials
description:
The application server exposes an unauthenticated endpoint that generates S3 `PutObject` presigned URLs using credentials stored in a workspace datasource. The route is protected only by the recaptcha middleware and does not require authentication, table permission, datasource permission, or builder access. A public caller who knows a workspace ID and S3 datasource ID can request a signed upload URL for attacker-controlled bucket and key values.

### Details

The static route registers the signe

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-50136.

title: Budibase has an Account Impersonation Issue — Chat Identity Link Hijacking via Missing Consent & CSRF
description:
## Title

**Chat Identity Link Hijacking — Attacker Can Silently Map Their Slack/Discord Identity to Any Authenticated Budibase User's Account**

## Severity

**High** — CVSS 3.1: AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N = **7.3**

## Affected Product

- **Product:** Budibase
- **Version:** 3.37.2 (introduced in this version)
- **Component:** `packages/server/src/api/controllers/ai/chatIdentityLinks.ts`
- **Endpoint:** `GET /api/chat-links/:instance/:token/handoff`


## Vulnerability Type

- CWE-352:

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-50132.

title: zeroconf: Unvalidated rdlength in record payload readers allows LAN-local cache corruption via crafted mDNS packet
description:
### Impact

`_read_character_string` and `_read_string` in `src/zeroconf/_protocol/incoming.py` sliced `self.data[self.offset : self.offset + length]` and advanced `self.offset` by the declared `length` without checking it against `self._data_len`. Python's slice silently returns fewer bytes when the end index runs past the buffer, so a record whose 16-bit RDLENGTH (RFC 1035 §3.2.1) over-advertised by tens of kilobytes was constructed from a truncated payload, appended to `DNSIncoming._answers`,

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an attacker on the same LAN to send a crafted mDNS packet that can corrupt the cache of the zeroconf library. This could lead to denial of service, incorrect DNS resolution, or potential exploitation of downstream systems relying on the corrupted data.
recommended_actions: Update the zeroconf library to the latest patched version that addresses CVE-2026-48487.
Implement network segmentation to isolate critical systems from untrusted LAN devices.
Monitor and log mDNS traffic for anomalies and block suspicious packets using network security tools.

title: devbridge-autocomplete has XSS in its default formatters: formatGroup and formatResult fail to escape HTML in untrusted inputs
description:
### Summary The default `formatGroup` and `formatResult` functions in `devbridge-autocomplete` concatenate values into HTML without escaping, allowing XSS when an attacker controls (or can taint) the suggestion data source. ### Details **1. `formatGroup` — `category` is interpolated raw.** `src/format.ts`: ```ts function formatGroup(suggestion, category) { return '
' + category + '
'; } ``` If `groupBy` is used and the grouping field of any suggestio

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity.

title: scimPatch vulnerable to prototype pollution via unfiltered keys in patch
description:
## Summary

`scim-patch` performs prototype pollution when applying a SCIM PATCH operation whose `value` object contains a key like `"__proto__.someProp"`. After one such patch,
`Object.prototype.someProp` is set process-wide, affecting every plain object in the Node process.

Any service that calls `scimPatch()` on attacker-controlled JSON (i.e. any SCIM endpoint accepting `PATCH` from an external IdP) is exploitable on a stock Node runtime.

## Impact

- **Class:** Prototype pollution ([CWE-13

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform prototype pollution via unfiltered keys in SCIM PATCH operations, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution, data corruption, or denial of service across the Node.js process. This could compromise the integrity and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update to a patched version of the `scim-patch` library, if available, or apply any recommended mitigations from the vendor.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization to reject JSON payloads containing `__proto__` or other potentially dangerous keys.
Conduct a thorough review of all SCIM endpoints and ensure they are not exposed to untrusted sources or are adequately protected by authentication and access controls.

title: nebula-mesh's stores enrollment tokens unhashed in SQLite
description:
`internal/store/sqlite.go:1177,1192,1221,1245` — the `enrollment_tokens.token` column holds the raw UUID token. `ConsumeToken` does `WHERE token = ?` against the raw string. Compare with `operator_api_keys.key_hash`, which is SHA-256 hex (constructed in `internal/api/middleware.go:51-53`).

## Affected
All released versions up to v0.3.0.

## Threat model
Read access to `nebula-mgmt.db`: backup, snapshot, file-system access, future SQL-injection sink. The principle of defense-in-depth: API keys a

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity.

title: CVE-2025-10262 - Nokia SR Linux is vulnerable to local privilege escalation vulnerability due to unsanitized format v
description: Nokia SR Linux is vulnerable to local privilege escalation vulnerability due to unsanitized format validation. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may allow an authenticated user to execute arbitrary commands with superuser privileges.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-10262.

title: CVE-2026-6964 - The Video Conferencing with Zoom plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all v
description: The Video Conferencing with Zoom plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 4.6.7. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to obtain the site's Zoom SDK API key and a freshly-signed JWT that can be used with the Zoom Web SDK to join any Zoom meeting associated with those credentials without a legitimate invitation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6964.

title: CVE-2026-7273 - A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the CGI program of Zyxel GS1900-48HPv2 firmware versi
description: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the CGI program of Zyxel GS1900-48HPv2 firmware versions through 2.90(ABTQ.1)C0 could allow a LAN-based, unauthenticated attacker to exploit the flaw and potentially execute OS commands via a crafted HTTP request.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker on the LAN to execute arbitrary OS commands, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, network disruption, or lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Zyxel GS1900-48HPv2 firmware to the latest version if a patch is available. If no patch is available, contact Zyxel support for guidance.
Restrict access to the device's management interface to trusted IP addresses and isolate it from untrusted networks.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity originating from or targeting the affected device, and implement intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS).

title: CVE-2026-42014 - A flaw was found in GnuTLS. The `gnutls_pkcs11_token_set_pin` function, used for changing the Securi
description: A flaw was found in GnuTLS. The `gnutls_pkcs11_token_set_pin` function, used for changing the Security Officer PIN, can lead to a use-after-free vulnerability. This occurs when an attacker attempts to change the PIN with a NULL old PIN for a token that lacks a protected authentication path.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-42014.

title: CVE-2026-1767 - A flaw was found in the GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor `tracke
description: A flaw was found in the GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor `tracker-extract-mp3` component. A remote attacker could exploit this heap buffer overflow vulnerability by providing a specially crafted MP3 file containing malformed ID3 tags. This incorrect length calculation during the parsing of performer tags can lead to a read beyond the allocated buffer, potentially causing a Denial of Service (DoS) due to a crash or enabling information disclosure.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1767.

title: CVE-2026-1766 - A flaw was found in GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor, specifical
description: A flaw was found in GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor, specifically within the tracker-extract-mp3 component. This heap buffer overflow vulnerability occurs when processing specially crafted MP3 files containing malformed ID3v2.3 COMM (Comment) tags. An attacker could exploit this by providing a malicious MP3 file, leading to a denial of service (DoS), which causes an application crash, and potentially disclosing sensitive information from the heap memory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1766.

title: CVE-2026-1765 - A flaw was found in the `tracker-extract-mp3` component of GNOME localsearch (previously known as tr
description: A flaw was found in the `tracker-extract-mp3` component of GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners). This vulnerability, a heap buffer overflow, occurs when processing specially crafted MP3 files. A remote attacker could exploit this by providing a malicious MP3 file, leading to a Denial of Service (DoS) where the application crashes. It may also potentially expose sensitive information from the system's memory.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1765.

title: CVE-2026-1764 - A flaw was found in GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor. When proce
description: A flaw was found in GNOME localsearch (previously known as tracker-miners) MP3 Extractor. When processing specially crafted MP3 files containing ID3v2.4 tags, a missing bounds check in the `extract_performers_tags` function can lead to a heap buffer overflow. This vulnerability allows a remote attacker to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) by triggering a read of unmapped memory. In some cases, it could also lead to information disclosure by reading visible heap data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1764.

title:
CVE-2026-12162 - Improper host validation in the social login autofill feature in 
Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager

Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager 2026.2.8 allows an attacker to 
disclose stored social login credentials via a crafted web entry 
pointing to a provider lookalike domain.

title:
CVE-2026-12161 - Improper input validation in the SSH Elevate Shell feature in 
Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager 20
description:
Improper input validation in the SSH Elevate Shell feature in 
Devolutions Remote Desktop Manager 2026.2.7 allows an authenticated user
 with permission to create or modify a shared SSH entry to execute 
arbitrary commands on a remote SSH host using stored elevation 
credentials via a crafted alternate username and user interaction with 
the Elevate Shell action.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-12161.
